mapper.select: select * from ncs_drill where did not in (select drill_id from DrillList where course_id=#{param1})
select * from ncs_drill where did in (select drill_id from DrillList where course_id=#{param1})
mapper.update: update ncs_drill set name=#{param1},comment=#{param2},dtype_id=#{param3}, updated=current_timestamp where did=#{param4}
